steps.title: Relate h and j
steps.content:
Translate the first percent statement into an equation.
$$0.36h=0.72j$$
$$h=2j$$

steps.title: Substitute the value of j
steps.content:
The second statement says $j$ is $65\%$ of $k$.
$$j=0.65k$$
$$h=2(0.65k)=1.30k$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: The equation $h=1.30k$ gives the requested percent of $k$. The answer is 130.
